title: Best Optimized
description: The Best Optimization and Quality of Life Modpack
body:
**_Best Optimized_** contains **Optimization mods** capable of incredibely increment Minecraft FPS, making possible playing at **hundreds of FPS even using the maximum Render Distance** and Simulation DIstance of **32 Chunks**, It also provides tons of **Quality of Life mods** which provide different features including: 

-**Better Settings Management** 

-**Faster Loading Screens**

-**Better Mods Management**

-**Zoom**

-**Better Compatibility For Resource Packs** 

-**Multiplayer**

-**Vanilla Minecraft Improvements**

_And More_

![Different Quality of Life Mods](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3f33ca5ca07638657d971d9f121b7759d2ee2e45.jpeg)

**And of course, it is Perfect to Play with Shaders Without Lowering Render Distance**

![Picture of Minecraft running at 180 FPS with Shaders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2127e451bdb42fb04b7dbfd9d4ed9241faa13093.jpeg)
_Render Distance was still set to 32 Chunks in this picture_


[CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/best-optimized) (Modrinth Version is better)
